content:
• A New York civil protection attorney (for parallel or originating threat)

⸻

II. Referral Chain: NY → FL

David is thinking strategically. This is solid:
• NY-based lawyers can refer directly to FL-based colleagues through bar networks
• Ask specifically for probate, estate litigation, and fraud-adjacent probate attorneys
• Also inquire about lawyers familiar with LGBTQ+ partner representation

Script to use:

“Hi, I’m based in NY but I’m dealing with a probate fraud case in Florida involving my late partner. I’m looking for a lawyer in Broward County. Do you happen to know someone reliable down there who deals with high-conflict probate and asset recovery?”

⸻

NEXT ACTIONS YOU CAN TAKE
context: From document: Restraining Order / Legal Referral — chunk 3 (chunk 3/4)
